text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been smooth sailing toward the<n>Grand
Concert, thanks to the help of<n>students, fans, staff,
and the URA.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: This is where the Grand Concert will<n>take place!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's so big!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
We do still have a lot of details to<n>hammer out,
but...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Today, I wanted to let the students<n>get a sense of
the scale of the place<n>and the features of the
different<n>stages.

text_block_list.name: Assembled Students
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Could anyone spare a<n>moment to
help me carry these booth<n>materials?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Right here! Falco's got you co—

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: No, that won't do! You all have<n>training after this.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So please, don't tire yourselves out.<n>Leave setting
up the stages to us<n>fans.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the Grand Concert isn't the<n>only stage
you want to stand on, is it?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you all have wishes the<n>Grand Concert
can't make come<n>true—feelings of gratitude only a
winning concert can convey.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: We've got nothing to do at stage C!<n>I'll help!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Us fans are here to support you<n>students in any
way we can.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: We can take care of things here.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
All you have to do in return is shine<n>your brightest
on the stages we set<n>up for you.
choice_data_list: We all have our own roles to play.
We all have our own roles to play.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Okay!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I've been wondering, what songs are<n>we going to
sing at the concert?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Am I correct to assume we will pick<n>from the
songs we've already been<n>singing?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I actually have some ideas about that.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
First off, I think we should avoid G1<n>songs.
They're special songs that<n>can only be sung after
a victory, and I<n>think we should keep them that
way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Agreed.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking of asking everyone<n>who wants
to perform whether<n>they'd prefer to sing alone or
in a<n>group, then have original songs made<n>for
them.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Can't leave anyone out.<n>I've already
gotten our songwriter on<n>board.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
The purpose of this concert is to let<n>everybody
sing for themselves, and<n>I'm sure they all have
different<n>feelings they want to put into song.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer, I'm counting on you to<n>take care of the
task I entrusted you<n>with!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well? No need to keep secrets. What<n>is this "task"
you've been entrusted<n>with?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, could you and the girls think<n>of lyrics for
this song?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Yes, this is an arrangement that's<n>been
tailor-made for the Grand<n>Concert.
choice_data_list: Are you not going to join us?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...No, my role is that of a bystander.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
The lyrics should come from those<n>running in the
here and now.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you write them with us<n>fans in mind,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I put on the song Light Hello gave me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: New mission received. Understood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We rack our brains over the lyrics on<n>the bus ride
back to the academy.
